name: anhoc-root
description: Anhoc Math Learning Application Monorepo Root

scripts.dev:raw: npx concurrently --kill-others --names "backend,chatbot,frontend" -c "green,yellow,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "cd chatbot && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn main:app --port 5002 --reload" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend && cd chatbot && .\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pip install -r requirements.txt
